description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a modern kitchen setup with a combination of red and white finishes. The unit includes a tall refrigerator on the left, a countertop with an integrated sink and draining board, a microwave, and a freestanding electric stove with four burners and an oven. Above the countertop, there are wall-mounted cabinets with sleek, flat doors, providing ample storage space. The lower section consists of multiple drawers and cabinets, some with visible open shelving and others with solid doors. The overall design is streamlined and functional, suitable for contemporary urban kitchens.
description: A modern red and white kitchen cabinetry set with integrated appliances, wall cabinets, and multiple storage compartments. Features include a refrigerator, sink, microwave, stove, and both upper and lower cabinetry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full kitchen setup with refrigerator, sink, microwave, stove, and all cabinetry details visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinetry and the alignment of the appliances and wall cabinets.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back panels of the cabinetry and appliances, with minimal detail on handles or hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the refrigerator and the side profile of the cabinetry and wall units.
attribute_cabinet_type: base cabinet, wall cabinet, tall pantry cabinet
attribute_door_configuration: double door, single door, drawers, open shelf
